candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue figure; best representation of total revenue/sales.
Cost line, not revenue; rejected for REVT.
COGS-type line, not revenue; rejected for REVT.
Financial income, not operating revenue; rejected for REVT.
Interest income component, not total revenue; rejected for REVT.
Interest income component, not total revenue; rejected for REVT.
Adjustment to financial income, not operating revenue; rejected for REVT.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Net income measure, not revenue; rejected for REVT.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income/(loss) for the period
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue; rejected for REVT.
Standard label for cost of goods sold / cost of sales; likely used in some periods.
Could include both production and overhead payroll; less precise than explicit cost of sales; secondary candidate only.
Highly specific to production/mining costs and explicitly labeled as cost of sales; best representation of COGS.
Generally overhead/SG&A-type costs rather than direct production; excluded from COGS.
Remainder of other operating expenses; more like SG&A; excluded from COGS.
Specific legal/provision costs, more overhead than production; excluded from COGS.
Operating overhead; not purely direct production costs; excluded from COGS.
R&D, not cost of goods sold; excluded from COGS.
Generic other expenses, likely overhead/non-operating; not core COGS.
Financial expense, not production cost; excluded from COGS.
Financial expense, not production cost; excluded from COGS.
Non-operating; not cost of goods sold.
Balance sheet liability, not an income statement cost line; excluded for COGS mapping.

variables.notes: Both selected as alternative labels over time for direct production/cost of sales; later processing will pick first non-missing per year.

candidates.why: Share-based compensation is a classic SG&A component (overhead, not COGS).
Label indicates operating overhead; appropriate SG&A bucket when not a total line with 'Total' in name.
Remainder of other operating expenses, representing additional SG&A-type overhead.
Duplicate-style label with different casing; also share-based compensation as SG&A component.

variables.notes: Multiple component rows chosen to capture SG&A overhead; no totals or balancing items included.

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense line; best match for R&D.
Tax credit related to R&D, not the expense itself; excluded for XRD.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest component of lease liabilities; a form of interest expense.
Generic interest cost line, likely main interest expense line in some years.
Interest that is capitalized rather than expensed; included as lowest-priority fallback.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Capital Financing - Gross
candidates.why: Explicit gross interest expense on capital financing; strong interest expense candidate.
Equity attribution, not interest on debt; rejected for XINT.
Equity attribution, not interest expense; rejected for XINT.
Generic interest expense line; primary interest expense label when present.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental detail of lease interest expense; valid backup interest expense label.
Balance sheet accrual of interest payable; not the P&L expense line for XINT.
Equity item, not interest; rejected for XINT.
Equity item, not interest; rejected for XINT.
Unclear BS item; not necessarily the P&L interest expense line; excluded in favor of clearer IS labels.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Capital Financing - Gross
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Ordered as a priority list so later processing can select the first non-missing interest expense per year.

candidates.why: Income attribution, not a balance sheet equity stock; rejected for BE.

candidates.row_label: Other comprehensive income directly against equity
candidates.why: OCI flow item, not the equity stock; rejected for BE.
Explicit parent/owner equity line; preferred BE measure excluding non-controlling interests.
Equals equity attributable to ordinary shareholders here and may include NCI elsewhere; secondary to the more precise parent-equity line.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Technical balancing line, not the equity stock; rejected for BE.
Represents total assets/liabilities+equity, not equity alone; rejected for BE.

variables.notes: Parent/owner equity is used so that minority interest can be added separately without double counting.

candidates.why: P&L attribution of income to non-controlling interests; not the balance sheet stock but confirms presence of NCI concept.
Alternate P&L label for NCI; again an income flow, not the stock.
Balance sheet line for non-controlling interests; primary source for MIB.
Alternate balance sheet label for non-controlling interests in other periods; good backup.

variables.notes: Both BS NCI labels included as alternatives over time; later processing will use the first non-missing value per year.
